positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical and illustrative composition of bioluminescent deep-sea flora mixed with stylized constellations and fantastical overgrown botanical elements. The design must maintain a clean, strong silhouette look, suitable for a single-color screen print. Use a sophisticated Art Deco/Nouveau style with extreme attention to botanical detail and interconnected motifs. High contrast black ink on a creamy off-white background. Central composition, clean edges, vector quality, print-ready, radial symmetry, deep chiaroscuro effect.
